official_paper_citation.title: LongMemEval: Benchmarking Chat Assistants on Long-Term Interactive Memory

verification_method: repo URL, paper link, citation block, license and HF dataset provenance copied verbatim from third_party/benchmarks/LongMemEval-main/README.md and LICENSE (first-hand, not memory); SHA-256 and byte sizes recomputed live from data/longmemeval/* and the bundled paper PDF this session; byte-identity against the official release blob is NOT claimed (no network access this session). The _cleaned -> official correspondence is established offline from README text only (see provenance notes); where README gives no first-hand mapping it is recorded honestly as '来源待溯' rather than fabricated.

files.local_path: third_party/benchmarks/LongMemEval-main/Wu 等 - 2025 - LongMemEval Benchmarking Chat Assistants on Long-Term Interactive Memory.pdf

provenance._cleaned_variant_origin: third_party/benchmarks/LongMemEval-main/README.md (2025/09 news entry, first-hand): 'We have further cleaned up the history sessions to prevent interference on answer correctness. The updated benchmark can be found at https://huggingface.co/datasets/xiaowu0162/longmemeval-cleaned/'. The same README '## 🛠️ Setup / Data' lists wget targets resolve/main/longmemeval_s_cleaned.json and resolve/main/longmemeval_m_cleaned.json, matching the local data/longmemeval/longmemeval_{s,m}_cleaned.json filenames byte-for-byte by name.
provenance._cleaned_vs_paper_release: The paper (arXiv 2410.10813, 2024/10 release) introduced longmemeval_s.json / longmemeval_m.json / longmemeval_oracle.json. The README dataset-format section still documents these base names. The _cleaned suffix is the 2025/09 re-cleanup that 'replaces the original LongMemEval dataset' (data/README.md first-hand: 'This dataset replaces the original LongMemEval dataset. The main difference is that this version removes noisy history sessions that interfere with answer correctness.'). No raw non-cleaned longmemeval_s.json/longmemeval_m.json is present locally, so the base-vs-cleaned diff itself cannot be verified offline; the relationship is established from README text only.
provenance.change_log_source: README points to a Google Sheets change log (https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/16cHPu2B4XhgC-VvolIoWNs8wwm0Zkbpgu8H9x-qhxWg/edit?usp=sharing) and a Google Drive mirror (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zo5C2sKsN3-2TUZt7kiRd2wsZLmyd-4y/view?usp=sharing) for the _cleaned release. Not fetched this session (no network); recorded as documented official sources, not independently verified.
provenance.oracle_variant: README documents a third file longmemeval_oracle.json (oracle-retrieval, evidence sessions only). It is NOT consumed by this adapter (LONGMEMEVAL_VARIANT_SPECS only registers s_cleaned and m_cleaned), so it is not hashed/locked here. Its official HF split name is longmemeval_oracle.
provenance.huggingface_lfs_note: third_party/benchmarks/LongMemEval-main/data/gitattributes marks *.7z/etc. as LFS; the local data/longmemeval/*.json copies are plain JSON (verified by successful ijson streaming + json parsing), not LFS pointers.
provenance.local_commit_note: 来源待溯 (offline-open item): the exact GitHub commit of the local snapshot third_party/benchmarks/LongMemEval-main/ is NOT recorded here. Unlike locomo-main, no .git marker or pinned commit was available to verify offline this session; the snapshot carries HF-style data/README.md with config splits but no independent git provenance. The official_repo_url is copied from the README badge text (first-hand) and is the authoritative source identifier. Resolving the precise local-snapshot commit is deferred to the architect (requires a read-only network clone, which the no-network rule forbids this batch).

notes: third_party/benchmarks/LongMemEval-main/ has no independent verified .git provenance this session; official_repo_url and official_dataset_url are first-hand from README.md badge/link text. Do not trust git commands run inside that dir to identify the LongMemEval commit (parent-repo HEAD trap, same as locomo).

The bundled paper PDF path 'Wu 等 - 2025 - LongMemEval Benchmarking Chat Assistants on Long-Term Interactive Memory.pdf' is the actual local file; byte-identity with the arXiv release blob is NOT claimed (no network this session). The official_source field records arXiv 2410.10813 as the paper origin.

treatment of the _cleaned variant: this is the 2025/09 re-cleanup that replaces the original release. B2 (and all smoke/frozen artifacts) target the _cleaned variant only, matching the adapter's registered variants. Any comparison to paper numbers that used the pre-cleaning release must account for this.
